title: GitHub Security Watch
desc: Detect commits mentioning CVEs, vulnerabilities, or security patches in any repo.
condition: A new commit mentions security, vulnerability, CVE, fix, or critical patch.

title: Protocol Docs Change
desc: Watch when docs or changelogs update for breaking changes or new APIs.
condition: A new release, breaking change, deprecation, or migration guide is published.

title: Exchange Status Monitor
desc: Get alerted the moment an exchange reports degraded performance or downtime.
condition: Any service shows degraded performance, partial outage, or maintenance.

title: Solana Validator News
desc: Track Solana validator software releases and critical network updates.
condition: A new release mentions security fix, consensus change, critical patch, or mandatory upgrade.

title: SEC Filing Watch
desc: Monitor SEC EDGAR for crypto-related filings and regulatory announcements.
condition: A filing mentions cryptocurrency, digital asset, bitcoin, ethereum, or blockchain.

title: DeFi Protocol Health
desc: Watch for liquidation events, oracle issues, or unusual activity on major DeFi protocols.
condition: Any incident, degradation, or maintenance affects protocol operations.

title: Hedera Council Updates
desc: Track Hedera governance proposals, council votes, and network upgrades.
condition: A new post announces upgrade, proposal, vote, or governance change.

title: Bitcoin Core Release Watch
desc: Monitor Bitcoin Core for new releases, RBF changes, or protocol proposals.
condition: A new release or pre-release includes protocol change, security fix, or BIP implementation.

title: Zcash halo2 — Code Alpha
desc: Detect critical crypto bugs in zcash/halo2 commits before the market prices them in. Inspired by the June 2025 soundness fix that took 4 days to hit price action.
condition: A new commit fixes a critical cryptography bug, soundness issue, or verifying key change in the halo2 circuit — something that could affect ZEC token confidence or require immediate network attention.

title: Chainalysis Sanctions Feed
desc: Monitor Chainalysis sanctions lists for newly flagged wallets, exchanges, or DeFi protocols.
condition: A new blog post or sanctions update mentions OFAC, sanctioned wallet, exchange ban, or DeFi protocol restriction.
